testsuite.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation loads the HTML template and contains the form, button, and dynamic content container
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation loads the HTML template and contains the form, button, and dynamic content container

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should add an element to the DOM
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should add an element to the DOM

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should remove an element from the DOM
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should remove an element from the DOM

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should display and clear error messages
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should display and clear error messages

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should submit the form and update the DOM with user input
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should submit the form and update the DOM with user input

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should show an error for empty form submission
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should show an error for empty form submission

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should simulate a button click and update the DOM
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should simulate a button click and update the DOM

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should create dynamic elements with the expected class and text
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should create dynamic elements with the expected class and text

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should update input value and submit the form correctly
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should update input value and submit the form correctly

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should handle form submission directly and update the DOM via an event
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should handle form submission directly and update the DOM via an event

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should return false when removing a missing element
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should return false when removing a missing element

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should throw an error when adding an element to a missing container
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should throw an error when adding an element to a missing container

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should throw an error when simulating a click with a missing button
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should throw an error when simulating a click with a missing button

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should throw when submitForm is called with a missing form or target
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should throw when submitForm is called with a missing form or target

testcase.classname: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should attach event listeners and process a live form submit
testcase.name: DOM Testing and User Behavior Simulation should attach event listeners and process a live form submit
